race.comment: TRUMP CARD (2) has a handy record around this circuit with a win and four placings from seven spins and will be rock-hard fit for this. Gets 1.5kg off with the claim and maps ideally from gate three. Respect from the Vandyke yard. CONTINGENCY (3) was too bad to be true at the latest outing but the two runs prior to start the campaign were full of merit. Can bounce right back. WEONA REDWOOD (1) is another to get some weight relief and only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to be featuring in the finish. WHATJEUDOIN' (5) has placed two of three over this staying trip and looks a must for the multiples. The well-related KERKORIAN (4) (full to G2 winner Plenty Of Ammo) next in line.
